## Services
Bridal makeup (Christian, Hindu, Muslim) · HD & airbrush · Party makeup · Hair styling & colour · Keratin & hair botox · Gel nails · Facials · Waxing · Threading

- Standard Airbrush: ₹32,500
- Premium Signature Airbrush: ₹40,000
